original_snippet_context: Discussion of the exchange market and its relation to coffee prices and international credit operations.
relevant_quote: Por outro lado. restam ainda operações de credito internacionaes de certa importância, nisso continuando baseado o mercado para agir na alta, tendo agora em seu favor os saques sobre £ 300.000 do go- verno.
justification: This section discusses the influence of international credit operations and government funds on the exchange market, without expressing an opinion on the Caixa de Conversão or specific conversion rates. It's descriptive of market forces.
